body_preview: - Harness seed task was auto-generated because older sessions (pre-Day 131) had no-task planning runs. - Current trajectory contradicts the crisis premise: Day 132 (12:05) 1/1 strict verified, Day 131 (12:18) 2/2 strict verified. - However, Day 132 (04:02) and Day 131 (18:37) were no-task sessions — these were clean-tree sessions, not planning failures, but
expected_evidence: Future task manifests show selected task artifacts with non-protected Files entries If a planning phase produces zero task files, the manifest includes a visible warning Preseed fallback tasks that would touch protected files are filtered out Implementation Notes: This task was seeded by the harness before planner exploration. title: Harden preseed fallback task selection and manifest validation
